source.name: Swishy device and product showcase templates
source.license_notes: Use summarized motion patterns only; do not copy template output or assets.

layout_rules: Use device motion to demonstrate product context before diving into feature details.
Keep perspective motion slow and stable so UI content remains readable.
Use mockup entry as a hero moment, then transition into static usable screenshots or cards.
accessibility_notes: Avoid motion sickness from large 3D rotations.
Do not hide core product information inside video-only motion.
implementation_hints: Use transform perspective with small rotations, not extreme spins, for product mockups.
A 700-1200ms entry can work for hero sections; keep repeated interactions shorter.
Liquid Glass UI pairs well with device mockups when glass controls float above the device frame.

quality.notes: Swishy lists laptop opening, phone messages, app video showcase, mobile bookshelf, and similar product showcase templates.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use device/product showcase motion for app launch and hero sections: phone/laptop mockup entry, perspective reveal, message pop-ups, and settled readable product screens, with static fallback.
